subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Remember when thou didst turn to God and set thy face toward the Countenance in days wherein feet did stumble. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اذکر اذ اقبلت الی الله و توجهت الی الوجه فی ایام فیها زلت الاقدام طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
